summary: Backend tests for CohortData hiring portal iteration 2 (candidate auth + existing HR/exam flows). All 18 tests passed.

minor.issue: Duplicate check runs BEFORE password length check; a user with valid email + short password gets 409 (duplicate) if they retry, and reversing order would be more user-friendly. Also emails are lowercased server-side but not reflected/enforced clearly.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /api/candidate/register: swap order — validate password length BEFORE checking duplicate email, otherwise short-password + duplicate email cases return misleading 409 first.

auth.get_current_user does not enforce role; each candidate/HR endpoint must remember to check role. Consider role-scoped dependency helpers (get_current_candidate, get_current_hr) to avoid future forgotten checks.
POST /api/applications manually decodes the Bearer token instead of using get_current_user with a role check — duplicates logic. Refactor into an optional-auth dependency.
server.py is 500+ lines; candidate/HR/exam routers should be split into modules.
CORSMiddleware is added AFTER app.include_router; still works with Starlette but conventionally middleware should be added before routes for clarity.
No index on applications.candidate_id — will scan when candidate app list grows. Add compound index (candidate_id, created_at).
seed_admin correctly rehashes password when changed (playbook compliant). bcrypt $2b$ hash confirmed.
test_credentials: HR: hr@cohortdata.com / Cohort@2026 (verified). Candidates created dynamically via /api/candidate/register.
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral candidate users prefixed test_cand_/test_reg_ and one anonymous application per run. Not cleaned up (no delete endpoint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run tests with -n0 to avoid xdist worker isolation issues with session-scoped candidate fixture. All 18 assertions cover: candidate register (success/dup/short pwd), candidate login (success/wrong pwd/HR-blocked), /candidate/me (role isolation), /applications (candidate_id attach, dup 409, anonymous), /candidate/applications (list + enrichment), HR login/me/applications, and full invite→exam→submit with Claude AI risk scoring.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found; all functional requirements verified.
